subject: Charged twice for my monthly subscription
body: Hello, I noticed two identical charges of $29.99 on my credit card statement this month for my Pro subscription. My account is shivam@example.com. Please refund the duplicate charge immediately. This is very frustrating.

subject: App crashes when I try to export data
body: Every time I click the 'Export to CSV' button in the dashboard, the application crashes with a white screen. This has been happening since yesterday's update. I'm on Chrome 123, Windows 11. I need this fixed urgently — I have a presentation tomorrow.

subject: Cannot log into my account - password reset not working
body: I've tried resetting my password three times today but I'm not receiving the reset email. I've checked spam. My email is john.doe@company.org. I've been a customer for 2 years. Please help, I can't access any of my projects.

subject: Request: Add dark mode to the dashboard
body: Hi team, I love the product but working late at night is hard on the eyes. Could you please add a dark mode option to the dashboard? Many other tools have this. I think it would be a great addition for all users.

subject: URGENT: Production API down - enterprise customer
body: Our entire production system depends on your API. Since 2:00 AM UTC all API calls are returning 503 errors. We are losing $10,000 per minute. We have an SLA with you. Our account ID is ENT-9921. I need an immediate response and resolution.

subject: Suspicious activity on my account - possible hack
body: I received an email saying my password was changed but I didn't change it. Someone may have gained unauthorized access to my account. I see logins from IP addresses in Russia and China. My account has sensitive business data. Please lock it immediately.

subject: Spam account flooding our platform
body: There is a user (handle: @spammer99) who has been posting hundreds of spam messages in the community forums every day for the past week. They are advertising illegal products. Other users are complaining. Please ban this account immediately.

subject: How do I add team members to my workspace?
body: Hi, I just upgraded to Pro and I want to invite my colleagues to my workspace. I went to Settings but I can't find the option to add users. Can you walk me through the steps? Thanks!

subject: Billing discrepancy on enterprise annual invoice
body: We received our annual renewal invoice (INV-2026-0042) and the amount is $15,000 more than what was agreed in our contract signed on January 15th. Our contract clearly states $85,000/year. Please correct this immediately and send a revised invoice. CC: legal@bigcorp.com.

subject: API rate limits too restrictive for our use case
body: We are hitting the 1000 requests/minute API rate limit on our enterprise plan. Our data pipeline requires at least 5000 req/min. Can you increase our rate limits or offer a higher tier? This is blocking our product launch.

subject: Refund request - cancelled within trial period
body: I signed up for the Pro plan 5 days ago and I want to cancel. The product doesn't meet my needs. I was told I could get a full refund within 7 days of signing up. Please process my refund to the original card.

subject: Data export taking too long
body: When I try to export my data (about 50,000 rows), it says it will take 2 hours. Is this normal? Is there a faster way to get my data out? I need it for an analysis tonight.

subject: Please add Zapier integration
body: I would really like to see a Zapier integration so I can connect your product with my other tools like Slack and Google Sheets. This would save me so much time. Are there any plans for this?

subject: Account locked after too many login attempts
body: My account has been locked after I forgot my password and tried multiple times. I can't receive the unlock email either because my company's email server is down. Can you manually unlock my account? I have my account ID: USR-44821.

subject: User posting hate speech in community
body: User @hateful_user123 has been posting racist and sexist content in the community discussion boards for the past 3 days. Multiple users have reported it. I'm attaching screenshots. This violates your ToS and needs immediate action.

subject: How to connect to your REST API?
body: I'm a developer and I want to integrate your service into my app. Where is the API documentation? I looked on your website but couldn't find it easily. Do you have code examples in Python?

subject: Enterprise SLA breach - 4 hours downtime
body: Your service has been down for 4 hours today (10 AM - 2 PM UTC). Our SLA guarantees 99.9% uptime. This breach directly caused $50,000 in losses. We are formally requesting SLA credits and a full incident report. Our legal team will follow up.

subject: Webhook not firing on new events
body: I configured a webhook to fire when new records are created, but it stopped working 2 days ago. The webhook URL is valid (I tested it with Postman). My webhook ID is WH-9922. No events showing in the logs either.

subject: Can I get a student discount?
body: Hi! I'm a university student and I love your product. Do you offer any student discounts or an academic tier? I can provide my .edu email address as proof. Currently on the free plan but would love more features.

subject: Need to transfer account ownership to new manager
body: Our previous account admin (jane@oldcompany.com) has left the company. I am the new IT manager and I need to take ownership of our enterprise account. What is the process to transfer account ownership? Time-sensitive.

subject: Integration with Salesforce not syncing
body: We set up the Salesforce integration last week and it was working fine. Since yesterday, new contacts created in Salesforce are not appearing in your platform. The integration shows 'Connected' but sync isn't happening. Our Salesforce instance is enterprise edition.

subject: Fraudulent charges on my account
body: I never signed up for the Pro plan but I'm seeing $29.99 charges on my card for the past 3 months. Total of $89.97 has been charged without my authorization. I want a full refund and my card details removed from your system immediately. I may dispute this with my bank.

subject: Add bulk import from Excel
body: It would be incredibly helpful if we could import data directly from Excel spreadsheets (.xlsx format). Currently we have to convert to CSV first which is annoying. Many of our non-technical users struggle with this step.

subject: GDPR data deletion request
body: Under GDPR Article 17, I am formally requesting deletion of all personal data associated with my account (email: maria.garcia@personal.de). Please confirm deletion within the legally required 30 days and provide written confirmation.

subject: Phishing emails being sent using our domain
body: Our customers are receiving phishing emails that appear to come from our domain (company.com) but we didn't send them. Someone is spoofing our email domain using your platform's email sending feature. This is causing serious brand damage. Need immediate investigation.

subject: What are the data retention policies?
body: Hi, I'm evaluating your product for our company and our legal team needs to understand your data retention policies. How long do you keep our data? Can we export everything before cancellation? Do you support data residency requirements?

subject: Pro subscription cancelled but still being charged
body: I cancelled my Pro subscription on March 1st and received a cancellation confirmation email. However, I was still charged $29.99 on March 15th. Please refund this charge immediately. Order confirmation for cancellation: CANCEL-20260301-88721.

subject: SSO login broken after company migration
body: We recently migrated our company to a new Azure AD tenant. Now none of our 50 employees can log in via SSO. The error says 'Invalid tenant configuration'. We need this fixed urgently — our team is completely locked out. Account: ENT-7741.

subject: Bot accounts scraping our content
body: I've noticed a pattern of automated bot accounts systematically downloading all content from our shared workspace. The IPs rotate but the pattern is obvious (500 requests/second). This is violating our data and costing us bandwidth. Please block these bots.

subject: How do I set up automated reports?
body: Can you explain how to set up weekly automated reports? I want to send a PDF summary to my team every Monday morning. I found the 'Reports' section but I don't see a scheduling option. Am I missing something or is this a Pro feature?
